turns.user: 3 tin tức mới nhất openAI trên X
turns.assistant_text:
Here are the three latest updates from OpenAI on X:

1. **OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS**  
   OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, providing enterprises a new way to build on Amazon Bedrock with OpenAI through existing security, compliance, and governance workflows. This marks the beginning of a broader expansion of OpenAI capabilities on AWS, including future availability for cybersecurity capabilities like Daybreak.  
   [Read more](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2061564502160892138)  
   - **Likes:** 4,148 | **Retweets:** 417 | **Views:** 1,092,677

2. **AI can give researchers the freedom to pursue “crazier” ideas**  
   AI allows researchers to explore more unconventional ideas. Terence Tao discusses how AI creates more room to experiment, test unexpected paths, and discover what might otherwise remain out of reach.  
   [Read more](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2060451757818601808)  
   - **Likes:** 5,899 | **Retweets:** 634 | **Views:** 1,402,960

3. **In conversation with OpenAI’s Mark Chen, Terence reflects on AI's role in research**  
   Terence reflects on a future where AI reduces cognitive friction in research, helps preserve the paths behind discovery, and expands what mathematicians and scientists can attempt.  
   [Read more](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/2060451760033214653)  
   - **Likes:** 399 | **Retweets:** 35 | **Views:** 117,376

Let me know if you need anything else!

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new way to build on Amazon Bed
items.summary:
OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new way to build on Amazon Bedrock with OpenAI through the security, compliance, and governance workflows they already use.

This is also the beginning of a broader expansion of OpenAI capabilities on AWS, including future availability for cybersecurity capabilities like Daybreak.

https://t.co/vMws0YU6Q3

items.summary:

For Terence Tao, AI creates more room to experiment, test unexpected paths, and discover what might otherwise stay out of reach. https://t.co/InXb9Ahq2Y
